site.tagline: Remote collaboration software for small startup teams.

hero.eyebrow: Remote collaboration software for small startup teams
hero.title: Bring projects, workflows, issues, and docs into one deliberate rhythm.
hero.subtitle: Synaply gives small startup teams a shared context for planning, execution, handoff, and documentation so remote work keeps moving quickly without constant follow-up.

capabilities.title: Structure the work so the team can focus on delivery.
capabilities.description: Each module exists to reduce back-and-forth. Product, design, engineering, and operations stay aligned because the workflow itself carries the context forward.

items.name: Projects
items.title: Set project boundaries before the work fragments.
items.description: Capture goals, priorities, and delivery context so the team understands what matters now and what comes next.

items.name: Issues
items.title: Turn every task into a clear unit of progress.
items.description: Track actions, blockers, and follow-through with enough rigor to stay reliable without turning work into ceremony.

items.name: Workflows
items.title: Make every handoff legible.
items.description: Define stages, owners, and transitions so work keeps moving even when multiple roles are involved.

items.name: Docs
items.title: Keep the why next to the work itself.
items.description: Store requirements, decisions, and operational notes in the same space as execution, not in a separate archive.

workflow.title: Collaboration should run on clarity, not reminders.
workflow.description: When process is visible, progress stops depending on memory. The team spends less time asking where things stand and more time moving work forward.

steps.title: Define the outcome
steps.description: Projects establish the goal, scope, and sequencing so everyone starts from the same brief.

steps.title: Route work through issues
steps.description: Issues hold the current state, owners, notes, and next actions in a format that is easy to advance.

steps.title: Move through the workflow
steps.description: Transitions are explicit, handoffs are visible, and multi-role work stops disappearing between tools.

steps.title: Document as part of delivery
steps.description: Docs absorb context continuously, so the team can revisit decisions without reopening old threads.

finalCta.eyebrow: Start with clarity. Move with momentum.
finalCta.description: Build a shared workspace where planning, execution, and alignment stay connected.

auth.title: Enter the workspace where remote execution stays aligned.
auth.description: Projects, issues, workflows, and docs stay in one shared context so every role can move in the same direction.
highlights: Live sync that reduces repeat check-ins

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Return to the same workspace where priorities, states, and documentation already line up.

register.title: Create your team workspace
register.description: Start with a calmer remote collaboration tool for product, design, engineering, and operations.

reset.title: Recover access without losing context
reset.description: We will send a secure link so you can return to the same structured flow.

landing.coverSuffix: and let the workflow carry the rest.

productPreview.workspaceSubtitle: Projects, issues, workflows, and docs in one shared context

execution.title: Cross-role release coordination
execution.rowHint: Context stays attached as work moves.

context.title: Docs and updates stay attached
context.snippetBody: Launch checklist, reviewer notes, and release decisions stay visible beside the work instead of falling into chat history.

workflowPrinciple.label: Operating principle
workflowPrinciple.text: When the team shares one context, progress stops depending on reminders and starts depending on system design.

hero.titlePrefix: We want remote teams to work with more
hero.description: Synaply is built on a simple belief: the best collaboration software is not a faster inbox. It is a clearer environment where goals, process, work, and documentation belong to one logic.

story: Synaply was not designed to help teams manage more tasks.
It is focused remote collaboration software for small startup teams, where different roles can move through the same project context naturally.
When workflow is legible, context is intact, and docs stay attached to execution, teams can focus on delivery again.

principlesSection.title: How we think about collaboration software
principlesSection.description: This is not another place to stack tasks. It is a structure that helps teams stay in the same rhythm.

principles.title: One shared context
principles.description: Projects, issues, workflows, and docs should not live in disconnected tools. They should belong to the same operating surface.

principles.title: Workflow over chasing
principles.description: Better collaboration comes from clearer stages, ownership, and paths forward, not from more reminders and follow-up messages.

principles.title: Docs inside execution
principles.description: Requirements, rationale, and operational notes should stay attached to the work itself rather than fading into archive space.

preview.label: Product surface
preview.description: A live product surface instead of an abstract collaboration mock.
preview.imageAlt: Synaply remote collaboration workspace for projects, issues, workflows, and docs

symbol.label: Operating symbol
symbol.description: For us, collaboration software is valuable only if it can keep holding context as work moves.

about.closing: Less checking in. More work arriving where it needs to be.

hero.description: Synaply pricing is meant to preserve clarity. Teams at different stages should be able to start with a focused remote collaboration tool without unnecessary complexity.

included: No fragmented module sprawl, just one operating context
The goal is less coordination drag, not more feature volume
Packaging maps to team maturity, not arbitrary feature locks

planSignal.label: Plan signal
planSignal.description: The aim is not more surface area. It is a steadier way into the same operating rhythm.

plans.name: Launch
plans.summary: For teams setting up a calmer operating rhythm

plans.name: Team
plans.summary: For multi-role teams running steady execution

plans.name: Custom
plans.summary: For longer-term workflow design and rollout

offers.name: Launch
offers.description: For 3-8 person teams establishing a calmer remote collaboration rhythm.

offers.name: Team
offers.description: For 5-15 person cross-functional teams that need steadier handoffs and execution.

landing.title: Remote Collaboration Software for Small Startup Teams
landing.description: Synaply helps small startup teams stay aligned with clear execution, visible handoffs, and shared context across projects, issues, workflows, docs, and updates.

pricing.title: Pricing for Remote Team Collaboration Software
pricing.description: Explore Synaply pricing for remote product, design, engineering, and operations teams that need a calmer workflow, visible handoffs, and one shared execution context.

about.title: About Synaply and Our Remote Collaboration Philosophy
about.description: Learn why Synaply focuses on remote team clarity, structured execution, visible handoffs, and documentation that stays attached to projects, issues, and workflows.
